task_description: Fix the DELETE /api/admin/eids/:eid endpoint so that when an admin removes a user/agent, all references to that agent are fully cleaned up across the system - including the agent record, number assignments, followup locks, interested lead ownership, socket connections, and real-time stats broadcasts.

verification.summary: node --check server.js passes (syntax valid). Automated logic verification script confirms all 15 checks pass: agent record deletion, number reference cleanup (assignedTo, followupLockedBy, interestedBy), agentSocketMap for targeted socket disconnect, fallback broadcast, admin stats broadcast, rankings filter, and proper socket lifecycle management. No test framework exists in this project; verification done via AST/regex validation of the implementation logic.
